title: Molten Algerian Rum Wrap
description: A fresh, molten brunch dish featuring rum, ssam-wrap, and anti-inflammatory-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Rum-infused apricot jam
ingredients.notes: Make by reducing apricot jam with 1 tablespoon of dark rum

ingredients.name: Cinnamon-spiced chickpeas
ingredients.notes: Cooked chickpeas tossed with 1/4 teaspoon of cinnamon, 1/8 teaspoon of cayenne pepper

ingredients.name: Honey
ingredients.notes: Pure honey, warmed to a liquid

instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add 1/4 teaspoon of olive oil to the skillet.
Add the diced red bell pepper to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the crumbled almonds to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Toss in the cinnamon-spiced chickpeas and cook for 1 minute.
Remove the skillet from the heat and stir in the rum-infused apricot jam.
Place a ssam wrap on a flat surface and spread 1/4 of the skillet mixture onto the center of the wrap.
Drizzle 1/2 tablespoon of honey over the filling.
Top with a few pieces of fresh mint leaves.
Fold the bottom edge of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a tight cylinder.
